languages.text: "Есть свободная мишень? Я хотел{mf||а} бы поучиться у вас стрельбе".
"Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."
languages.original_text: "Есть свободная мишень? Я хотел{mf||а} бы поучиться у вас стрельбе".

traits.locale_text: "Do you have a spare target? I was hoping to learn shooting from you."
"Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."
[Discard any extraneous equipment and descend to the training ground]
"Do you have a spare target? I was hoping to learn shooting from you."
"Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

languages.text: [不要な装備は全て取り除き、訓練場へ降りる]
languages.original_text: [Discard any extraneous equipment and descend to the training ground]

languages.text: "Fazladan bir hedefin var mı? Senden atış yapmayı öğrenmek isterim."
languages.original_text: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

traits.locale_text: "Fazladan bir hedefin var mı? Senden atış yapmayı öğrenmek isterim."

languages.text: “还有多余的靶子吗？我想跟你学学射击。”
languages.original_text: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

traits.locale_text: “还有多余的靶子吗？我想跟你学学射击。”

languages.text: "Habt Ihr ein freies Ziel? Ich würde gerne Schießen von Euch lernen."
languages.original_text: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr ein freies Ziel? Ich würde gerne Schießen von Euch lernen."

languages.text: « Avez-vous une cible libre ? J'aimerais que vous m'appreniez à tirer comme vous. »
languages.original_text: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

traits.locale_text: « Avez-vous une cible libre ? J'aimerais que vous m'appreniez à tirer comme vous. »

languages.text: «¿Tiene una diana de sobra? Me gustaría practicar bajo su instrucción».
languages.original_text: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."

traits.locale_text: «¿Tiene una diana de sobra? Me gustaría practicar bajo su instrucción».
